ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was created */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales amount for the invoice */,
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping option used */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_shipping_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_id") REFERENCES shipping ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item within an invoice */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice this item belongs to */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  "sales" TEXT /* Total sales for this item */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "inventory" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Commission rate for the sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country to which the item is being shipped */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping to the specified country */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "processing_fee" TEXT /* Processing fee for the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice associated with the return */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES invoice_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount percentage offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee within the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee works in */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_products" (
  "supplier_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier-product relationship */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the product */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product supplied */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Cost per unit of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped', 'delivered') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item within an order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the inventory level changed */,
  "quantity_change" INTEGER /* Quantity by which the inventory level changed */,
  "new_inventory_level" INTEGER /* New inventory level after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code")
)
